{# ── Top bar: logo | site name | search + mobile toggle ── #}
{% if theme_config.siteLogo %} {% elif theme_config.siteWordmark %} {% else %} {{ config.siteName|truncatechars:1 }} {% endif %}
{{ config.siteName }}
{# ── Section bar: horizontal nav items ── #}

{# Spacer to offset fixed header height #}
